title: Hecate's Mystic Crossroads
description: Scattered across the land, ancient wells consecrated to ancient gods offer prayers, trials, and great rewards to those who earn their favor.
body:
# **-Hecate's Mystic Crossroads-**
# 
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18c0a595512d2e1309ab76b14be4c10187aa1469.png)
**Overview:**
This small mod introduces five rare, ancient well structures scattered across the world. These wells were once sites of worship for forgotten gods, and now, you have the chance to reignite their presence.

**How It Works:**
At the center of each well lies a sacred red flower. Right-clicking it allows you to offer sacrifices to the gods, unlocking one of 30+ random events. These events can be beneficial or harmful, with a natural tendency toward misfortune.

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VTzvNWfL/images/def1f3608ccf255f22ff7d290da890bec20f263b.png)

**So why risk angering the gods?**
Because hidden within their trials lies great power. Occasionally, instead of triggering a random event, one of three divine trials may be initiated. Completing a trial rewards you with a unique, powerful artifact, unobtainable by any other means.

**Increase Your Chances:**
To tilt fate in your favor, offer valuable gemstones and minerals such as emeralds or iron. These increase the likelihood of receiving positive effects or triggering a trial.

![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VTzvNWfL/images/53c8fa6e1c3e98f1513d2b96af33cc4698d30635.png)

**Compatibility:**
Fully compatible with major terrain and biome mods.
No known incompatibilities with other mods (will be updated if necessary).
To locate the mod structures using /locate, search only for "MysticCrossroads". 
Modded items count as the lowest-tier offering, meaning only vanilla materials will influence divine outcomes.

**Future Updates & Maintenance:**
This mod will be actively maintained and expanded, with plans to introduce:
New structures, events, and trials.
Additional artifacts and mechanics.

_If you're looking for more, you can check out the Hecate modpack, where this mod was originally designed to be used._

**Permissions & Usage:**
Feel free to use this mod in your modpack or do whatever you want with it.
![Banner1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18c0a595512d2e1309ab76b14be4c10187aa1469.png)
